reference: Good day. You need to be seen urgently. Rectal bleeding can be due to hemorrhoids, but considering your history of pain and constipation, you need to have a colonoscopy urgently. Please arrange to see a surgeon as soon as possible.
text: Good day. You need to be seen urgently. Rectal bleeding can be due to hemorrhoids, but considering your history of constipation, you need to have a colonoscopy urgently. Please arrange to see a surgeon as soon as possible.
